raw.message: $10 Tuesdays are back at Papa Murphy’s! Every Tuesday, any Large original or thin crust pizzas. Some deals are too good to stay gone. Order now.

hook.summary: Announcement of the return of a $10 Tuesday pizza deal.
hook.visual_action: Text elements 'IT'S BACK!!', '$10', and 'TUESDAYS' pop onto a red background above a steaming pizza.
hook.text_overlay: IT'S BACK!! $10 TUESDAYS ANY LARGE PIZZA*

scene_flow: Green banner with 'IT'S BACK!!' appears at the top over a red textured background.
Large '$10' and repeating 'TUESDAYS' text layers onto the center.
A yellow starburst badge with 'ANY LARGE PIZZA*' pops in.
Final static frame showing the complete offer over a steaming pizza.
audience_proxy: Budget-conscious families and pizza lovers looking for a recurring weekly value deal.
